site.name: VersionDude
site.tagline: The archive of open-source web-standards tooling
site.description: VersionDude documents the open-source web-standards and developer tools whose Subversion repositories were historically hosted on this domain, and points to where each project lives today.

home.ctaTitle: An independent reference for web-standards tooling
home.ctaText: Plain-language documentation of the open-source projects once hosted here — and where to find them today.

project.disclaimer: This page is original documentation. The project is the work of its own authors and community; VersionDude claims no authorship of, or affiliation with, it. The Subversion repository once hosted at svn.versiondude.net is no longer online — use the current home above.

article.disclaimerShort: Independent reference. We are not affiliated with the WHATWG or the projects linked above.

footer.about: An independent, original reference documenting the open-source web-standards and developer tools whose repositories were historically hosted on this domain. We claim no authorship of, or affiliation with, those projects.
footer.rights: VersionDude. Independent reference — no tracking beyond basic analytics.
footer.noAffiliation: Project names and links belong to their respective owners.
